notes: DJI's official presence in South Korea listing enterprise dealers that sell DJI Dock 3 and related solutions such as FlightHub 2 On-Premises.

column14: Official DJI partner in South Korea highlighted by Volarious as a key enterprise dealer expected to offer DJI Dock 3-based solutions for surveying and mapping.
Operates DJI Dock 3 at the Namyangju Wangsuk relocation project, using automated Dock 3 missions for bi-weekly surveying of a 6.4 km construction corridor.

notes: Digital twin and construction-tech company supporting the Hyundai E&C DJI Dock 3 deployment, marking the first real-world Dock 3-based automated operations on a Korean construction site.
Listed on DJI Korea's enterprise dealer search as a provider for DJI Dock 3 and FlightHub 2 On-Premises solutions in South Korea.

column14: Featured in DJI's Korean dealer search as an enterprise dealer associated with DJI Dock 3 and FlightHub 2 On-Premises offerings.
